## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md))

- [ ] Tests were added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Documentation was updated where relevant (English and 繁體中文 where applicable)
